system.flavor: You sow rapidly growing seeds of the blood oak, the carnivorous holy plant of the harvesters.
system.effect:
Zone a line 3 wall in free space in range.
• The area is dangerous terrain.
• Bloodied characters take +2 damage from this terrain, or +3 if they're in crisis.
• Once a round, when you score a finishing blow against any character, the plants feed on life force and you can cause the area to grow by 2 spaces, added to the total area in any way you choose. This could grow it under characters.
